Class UnownedIsland

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.island.AbstractIsland
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.island.UnownedIsland
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, ReadableIsland
public class UnownedIsland extends AbstractIsland
